description_long: This is a large, rectangular school building with a symmetrical layout, featuring a central entrance with a prominent staircase and circular driveway. The structure has a dark, hipped roof with multiple gables and dormers, and the facade is punctuated by evenly spaced windows and doors. The school is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn with rows of trees and small bushes, and there are parking areas on both sides of the property. The grounds are enclosed by a perimeter fence, and the main entrance is accessible via a wide paved road. The rear of the building includes additional green space and what appears to be a secondary entrance. The overall design is formal and institutional, with a focus on order and accessibility.
description: A large, symmetrical school building with a dark hipped roof, central entrance, and landscaped grounds with parking and perimeter fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with parking on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, side parking area, and rows of trees along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional green space, and the full width of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side parking, green areas, and the building's extended roofline.
